title: Perbualan Santai: Hujung Minggu
opening: Hai! Apa khabar? Saya tak sangka kita akan bersua di sini. Macam mana hujung minggu awak?

t1.prompt: Hai! Apa khabar? Saya tak sangka kita akan bersua di sini. Macam mana hujung minggu awak?
t1.promptTranslation: Hai! Apa khabar? (Ah-pah kah-bar) — Hi! How are you? I didn't expect us to meet here. How was your weekend?

t-repeat.prompt: Maaf, boleh awak ulang? Saya kurang jelas.
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Maaf, (mah-af) — Sorry, could you please repeat that? I didn't quite catch it.

t2.prompt: Oh, begitu ya? Kadang-kadang, berehat di rumah itu nikmatnya lain macam. Ada buat apa-apa yang menarik tak, atau sekadar membiarkan masa berlalu begitu saja?
t2.promptTranslation: Oh, (oh) — Oh, is that so? Sometimes, relaxing at home is a different kind of pleasure. Did you do anything interesting, or just let time pass by?

t3.prompt: Menarik sekali! Saya memang kagum dengan orang yang aktif macam awak. Awak terlibat dalam aktiviti apa? Mendaki, berbasikal, atau ada sukan lain yang jadi kegemaran?
t3.promptTranslation: Menarik sekali! (Meh-na-rik seh-ka-li) — How interesting! I'm really impressed with active people like you. What activities are you involved in? Hiking, cycling, or is there another sport you're passionate about?

t4.prompt: Fahamlah, kadang-kadang hujung minggu pun terasa singkat bila ada urusan. Harap awak dapat sedikit ruang untuk diri sendiri. Tapi, jangan risau, ada masanya kita perlu 'charge' semula, kan?
t4.promptTranslation: I understand, sometimes weekends feel short when there are errands. I hope you got some space for yourself. But don't worry, there are times we need to 'recharge', right?

t5.prompt: Ah, senario yang ideal! Ada apa-apa buku atau filem yang baru awak tonton dan ingin dicadangkan? Saya selalu mencari sesuatu yang boleh 'mencabar minda' atau sekadar hiburan ringan.
t5.promptTranslation: Ah, an ideal scenario! Are there any books or movies you've recently watched and would recommend? I'm always looking for something that can 'challenge the mind' or just light entertainment.

t6.prompt: Oh, saya memang penggemar makanan! Ada resipi baru yang awak cuba, atau awak cuma menikmati hidangan istimewa di luar? Saya selalu ingin tahu tempat makan 'hidden gem'.
t6.promptTranslation: Oh, I'm a big food lover! Did you try a new recipe, or did you just enjoy a special meal out? I'm always curious about 'hidden gem' eateries.

t7.prompt: Bagusnya! Memang satu kepuasan bila dapat 'melepaskan lelah' dengan aktiviti fizikal. Pernah terfikir untuk menyertai mana-mana komuniti atau acara berkaitan hobi awak tu?
t7.promptTranslation: That's great! It's truly satisfying to 'release fatigue' with physical activity. Have you ever thought about joining any community or events related to your hobby?

t8.prompt: Nampaknya kita ada banyak persamaan, atau sekurang-kurangnya, topik menarik untuk dibincangkan! Saya rasa masa pun dah semakin suntuk. Seronok bersembang dengan awak.
t8.promptTranslation: It seems we have a lot in common, or at least, interesting topics to discuss! I think time is running short. It was nice chatting with you.

t-end.prompt: Baiklah, saya kena bergerak dulu. Harap kita dapat berbual lagi lain kali. Selamat malam!
t-end.promptTranslation: Alright, I have to go now. I hope we can chat again sometime. Good night!
